what: Define cross-boundary Project contracts in shared package with strict runtime validation for project identity, create/select/rename/archive/restore payloads, and list/active query responses.

where.description: Add Project schemas/types exported for API and Web to ensure identical wire contracts.
Export every new Project schema/type as stable public API for workspace packages.
Add schema tests proving accepted and rejected payloads.

acceptance.given: A valid create payload with trimmed name length 1..80 and absolute path string
acceptance.when: The payload is parsed through shared schema
acceptance.then: Parsing succeeds and returns typed data with no unknown keys.

acceptance.given: A payload with empty name or missing required field
acceptance.when: The payload is parsed through shared schema
acceptance.then: Parsing fails with deterministic validation errors referencing the invalid field.

patterns.name: Feature Slices
patterns.reference: ARCHITECTURE.md -> section 1, shared contracts consumed by features only via public exports

patterns.name: DDD Boundary DTO
patterns.reference: ARCHITECTURE.md -> section 3, schemas in shared for API/web boundary crossing

context: API and Web cannot evolve safely without a single typed contract for Project payloads and responses.
technicalNotes: TDD order is mandatory: add failing schema tests first, then minimal schema code. Merge-safe: add new file and exports only; avoid modifying unrelated shared symbols. Models: Codex gpt-5.1-codex (low), Claude Haiku 4.5 (low).
